title: Integration of a Traditional Data Warehouse and Hadoop Environment
description: A visual representation showing how a traditional data warehouse and a Hadoop ecosystem coexist and interact in a modern big data analytics architecture, highlighting the flow of data between structured and unstructured data processing systems.
elements: Data Sources (Transactional DBs, Logs, Sensors, Social Media)
relationships: Structured data is extracted and loaded into the Data Warehouse via ETL
Raw, unstructured/ semi-structured data is ingested directly into HDFS
The Data Warehouse can archive cold data to HDFS for cost savings
Hadoop processing frameworks cleanse, transform, and analyze data in HDFS
Analytical tools query both the Data Warehouse and Hadoop to generate insights
